description: Golden eval for the FactoryOps Copilot. Each item is scored on (a) required tool(s) being called (grounding in live/historical data) and (b) key terms appearing in the answer. Designed to pass on both the Claude backend and the deterministic fallback. Target: >=80% pass rate.

cases.q: What is the OEE of line-1?
What is the OEE of line-2?
Give me the OEE for all lines.
How is line-1 performing?
What is the availability on line-2?
What is the quality rate on line-1?
Which line is the bottleneck?
What is limiting our throughput?
Which station has the most downtime?
How much downtime did line-1 have?
What is the top downtime cause on line-2?
How much of our downtime was unplanned?
Break down downtime by category.
What defects are we seeing on line-1?
What is the most common defect type?
Why is our scrap rate high on line-2?
Why is line-1 OEE low?
Why did line-2 go down?
What is the root cause of the line-1 mechanical stops?
Have we seen surface defects on line-1 before?
What is the reason for the cascade from line-1 to line-2?
Why is performance low on line-1?
What downtime did we have overall?
Show me the worst-performing line.
What quality issues need attention on line-2?
